payment.note: Jen will handle any promised cash prizes directly.

subtitle: A sweet and funny birthday casino packed with tacos, plants, candles, sisterly love, and Dave keeping a very unofficial eye on the results.
bigline: Sarah gets 5 official plays for laughs, love, and promised birthday cash from Jen.

welcome.title: Welcome, Sarah!
paragraphs: This is your official 40th Birthday Playable Greeting from Jen.
You get 5 official plays. Some prizes win promised cash from Jen. Some prizes win laughs. Every prize is powered by tacos, plants, candles, and birthday joy.
welcome.overrideLine: Important rule: Dave may inspect the results, but his authority ends where Sarah birthday happiness begins.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: Guaranteed minimum birthday love: unlimited. Guaranteed Dave commentary: probably also unlimited.

rules: Play until the prize is revealed.
Cash prizes are promised gifts from Jen only.
Anyone who says Sarah has enough plants must leave the casino immediately.

finale.title: 🎉 Official 40th Birthday Result
finale.note: Official game: Sarah keeps the laughs and the best promised cash win. Final gift fulfillment is up to Jen.
finale.restartButton: 🔄 Play Again Because Dave Demands A Recount

footer: Made with love for Sarah. Tacos, gardening, candles, and birthday luck may have influenced the results. Dave objections have been respectfully overruled.

customerInputs.oneThingEveryoneKnows: Sarah is known for believing she only needs one more plant.

slots.marqueeStart: ✨ 40TH BIRTHDAY SLOT LUCK LOADING FOR SARAH ✨
rules: Press spin until the prize is revealed.
Cash prizes are promised gifts from Jen only.
Anyone who says Sarah has enough plants must leave immediately.
slots.finaleNote: Official game: best promised cash win from the birthday spins counts. Funny prizes count as family approved birthday glory.

prizes.title: 40th Birthday Starter Win
prizes.msg: Sarah wins 5 dollars because turning 40 deserves an opening celebration before Dave can locate a calculator.

prizes.title: Birthday Queen Bonus
prizes.msg: Sarah wins 10 dollars because the Birthday Queen ruling is final, fabulous, and not subject to committee review.

prizes.title: Laughter Jackpot
prizes.msg: No cash this time, but Sarah wins one official family laugh and the right to retell the story with extra dramatic details.

prizes.title: Forty And Fantastic Clause
prizes.msg: Sarah is officially declared forty and fantastic. This clause cannot be appealed, amended, or questioned by anyone holding a receipt.

prizes.title: Sister Sponsored Cash Drop
prizes.msg: Sarah wins 20 dollars from Jen birthday fund. Playable Greetings pays in confetti only, while Jen handles the real world celebration.

prizes.title: Taco Emergency Fund
prizes.msg: Sarah wins 5 dollars toward tacos because tacos are not simply food. They are a 40th birthday strategy.

prizes.title: One More Plant Permit
prizes.msg: Sarah officially wins permission to believe one more plant is necessary, even if several plants are already forming a quiet indoor government.

prizes.title: Candle Acquisition Approval
prizes.msg: Sarah wins the right to buy another candle because this one has a completely different scent, mood, season, vibe, and emotional assignment.

prizes.title: Slot Stream Shout Out
prizes.msg: Internet Skater Brandon interrupts the imaginary broadcast to wish Sarah a Happy 40th Birthday and remind everyone that the bonus could always be one spin away.

prizes.title: Dave Audit Override
prizes.msg: Sarah wins 10 dollars. Dave opened a review of the taco, plant, and candle evidence, but birthday law overruled the entire investigation.

prizes.title: Dave Objection Form
prizes.msg: Dave may file one official objection. Processing time is 3 to 5 business birthdays, and Sarah may buy another plant while waiting.

prizes.title: Real Jackpot
prizes.msg: No cash is needed for this one. The real jackpot is that Jen, Dave, Emma, Jack, and everyone who loves Sarah are grateful for her, laughing with her, and celebrating the gift she is.
